review: Saves me 30 minutes every morning. The action items feature is incredibly useful.
Good summaries but sometimes misses important emails in long threads.
Perfect for our open source project. Label suggestions are spot on.
Best meeting notes agent I've tried. Action items with owners are a game changer.
Works well for standups. Would love better integration with calendar events.
Got actionable feedback that helped me land interviews. Highly recommend.
Found some deals but prices weren't always accurate. Needs improvement.
Flashcards are great for exam prep. Study plans could be more customizable.
